code: import axios from'axios';const api=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:8080/api'});export async function createUser(formData){const resp=await api.post('/users/upload',formData,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});return resp.data;}export async function getUser(id){const resp=await api.get("/users/".concat(id));return resp.data;}export async function listUsers(){const resp=await api.get('/users');return resp.data;}export default api;
